page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software for the analysis of DNA fingerprints (AFLP, t-RFLP, RAPD, ERIC-PCR, RFLP-PCR). It works in a fast and efficient way with trace files (FSA files) as well as with gel image files (TIFF, JPG, BMP, etc.) and handles AFLP, t-RFLP, ERIC-PCR, RFLP-PCR or RAPD data.
